Nginx Production Configuration: This nginx.conf serves as the production reverse proxy configuration for api.example.com, terminating TLS and forwarding traffic to the upstream application cluster. The upstream block defines four backend servers with keepalive 64 to reuse connections, and a least_conn load balancing policy. SSL is configured with TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only, using a strong cipher suite and HSTS header with max-age of one year. Gzip compression is enabled for text/html, application/json, and application/javascript content types to reduce bandwidth.
